raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California will prohibit the manufacture or sale of any cosmetic product containing any of 24 specified toxic chemicals starting in 2025.",
    "The 24 toxic chemicals banned by California are known to cause cancer, reproductive harm, and hormone disruption.",
    "The science is clear on the harmful nature of the chemicals banned by AB 2762.",
    "AB 2762 provides Californians with the same consumer protections already provided in the European Union, which has also banned these products.",
    "AB 2762 bans chemicals that harm human health.",
    "The majority of the chemicals banned by AB 2762 are linked to breast cancer.",
    "One in eight women will develop breast cancer in her lifetime.",
    "The banned chemicals include known carcinogens, reproductive toxicants, endocrine disruptors, or autoimmune suppressants.",
    "The banned chemicals make consumers susceptible to COVID-19, cancer, and reproductive harm.",
    "More than 40 other nations, including the European Union, have proactively prohibited or restricted the use of hundreds to thousands of cosmetic ingredients."
  ]
}
```
